steps.title: Identify how the sentences relate
steps.content: The first sentence states the poem inspired writers. The second identifies those who adopted its style as named after Okot. This is a logical extension—not a contrast or comparison, just a naming convention that follows from the influence described.

steps.title: Find the transition that fits the logic
steps.content: Fittingly conveys that naming writers after the poet whose style they adopted makes sense. The other choices wrongly introduce either contrast (Nevertheless, Instead) or a false comparison (By comparison). That matches choice B — B is correct.
